name: Strawberry Banana Cake I.e.s.jjgf65a
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the biscuit mix, milk, egg, melted butter, and melted chocolate in a bowl. Mix thoroughly.
2. In a blender, blend the strawberries and banana for a few seconds until semi liquid.
3. Add the blended mixture to the cake batter and mix again.
4. Pour the batter into a 9-inch square baking pan.
5. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for about 30 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean. The cake will be extremely moist, so the toothpick may have some moisture on it.
6. Serve warm or cold.
